# AI Tool Pricing Index v0.1

Date: 2026-05-13

This is a v0.1 benchmark report based on sample/extracted records. It is not a quality guarantee, official ranking, legal advice, purchasing advice, or safety certification.

## Dataset Scope

- Action objects: 20
- Pricing models: {'usage_based': 10, 'seat_based': 5, 'open_source': 3, 'freemium': 2}

## Pricing-Related Fields

This report checks pricing model, free-tier signal, starting price, and rate-limit policy presence.

## Known Limitations

- Pricing fields are sample/extracted benchmark records.
- AOI does not provide purchasing advice or execute purchases.
- Prices and plan details are not verified live.
